issue_summary: in interface FieldVector, replaced throws statements with javadoc comments.
code_before:
FieldVector<T> mapDivide(T d)
        throws NullArgumentException, MathArithmeticException;
javadoc_before:
/**
     * Map a division operation to each entry.
     * @param d value to divide all entries by
     * @return {@code this / d}
     * @throws NullArgumentException if {@code d} is {@code null}.
     * @throws MathArithmeticException if {@code d} is zero.
     */
javadoc_after:

    • *

    • *
